IReportRequestConfigurator Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The IReportRequestConfigurator type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
BuildReportResponseAsync
Builds the report response.
GetResponseType
Returns the preferred response type for the report request, or null if the client has no preference.
